name: type: refactor
description: Internal restructuring without intended behavior changes

name: type: documentation
description: README, ADR, API, or contributor documentation

name: type: security
description: Authentication, authorization, secrets, or vulnerability work

name: type: maintenance
description: Tooling, cleanup, dependency, or repository maintenance

name: area: architecture
description: Service boundaries, ADRs, and cross-cutting design

name: area: messaging
description: RabbitMQ, Outbox, Inbox, and event contracts

name: area: api-contract
description: DTOs, OpenAPI, versioning, and Problem Details

name: area: observability
description: Logs, traces, metrics, and health checks

name: area: import-engine
description: Staging, import jobs, parsing, and data portability

name: status: blocked
description: Cannot progress because of a dependency

name: priority: critical
description: Security, data integrity, or release blocker

name: good first issue
description: Well-scoped entry point for a contributor

name: dependencies
description: NuGet, containers, Actions, or tooling updates

name: breaking-change
description: Incompatible API, event, or migration change
